somali.metallic_fm_bell_tone: Cod FM bell oo bir u eg
somali.deep_808_style_sub_bass: Sub bass qoto dheer oo nooca 808
somali.barry_harris_1929_2021_codified_bebop_: Barry Harris (1929-2021) wuxuu habeeyay harmony bebop. Nidaamkiisu wuxuu isticmaalaa chords 6 halkii 7 wuxuuna ku daraa diminished passing chords inta u dhaxaysa heerarka scale si loo helo voice leading jilicsan.
somali.attack_time_to_reach_full_volume_decay: Attack: waqtiga la gaaro volume buuxa. Decay: waqtiga la dego ilaa sustain. Sustain: heerka volume la hayo. Release: waqtiga uu ku dhamaado ka dib markii la sii daayo key.
somali.a_scale_is_an_ordered_set_of_pitches_m: Scale waa ururin habaysan oo pitches ah. Modes waa wareegyo scale kuwaas oo ka bilaabma heerar kala duwan. Mid kastaa wuxuu abuuraa dareen kala duwan.
somali.chords_are_built_by_stacking_intervals: Chords waxaa lagu dhisaa isku dulsaarista intervals (3aad). Major wuxuu isticmaalaa major 3rd + minor 3rd. Minor wuu rogaa. Chords balaaran waxay ku daraan 7th, 9th, iyo wixii ka badan.
somali.kicks_use_a_sine_oscillator_with_a_pit: Kicks waxay isticmaalaan sine oscillator oo leh pitch sweep. Snares waxay isku daraan buuq (la sifeeyay) + jidhka toonka. Hi-hats waxay isticmaalaan qarxinta buuqa oo high-pass la sifeeyay.
somali.4_4_4_quarter_note_beats_per_bar_most_: 4/4 = beats quarter-note 4 bar kasta (kuwa ugu badan). 3/4 = dareen waltz. 6/8 = compound duple. 5/4 iyo 7/8 waxay abuuraan grooves aan sinnayn, oo qalaad.
somali.keys_arranged_by_ascending_5ths_clockw: Keys waxaa loo habeeyay 5ths kor u kaca oo saacad ku wareegaya. Keys deriska ah waxay wadaagaan 6 notes 7-da. In saacad loo socdo waxay ku dartaa sharps; lidkeeda flats.
somali.every_musical_sound_contains_overtones: Cod muusig kasta wuxuu ka koobanyahay overtones ka sarreeya aasaaska. Xooggooda isku dhigma ayaa go'aamiya timbre — sababtaas ayaa turubada u eg ka duwan tahay flute pitch isku mid ah.
somali.an_interval_is_the_distance_between_tw: Interval waa masaafada u dhaxaysa laba pitch, waxaa lagu cabbiraa semitones. Saamiga frequency ayaa go'aamiya consonance (saami fudud sida 3:2 wuxuu u dhawaaqaa jilicsan).
somali.plays_chord_notes_one_at_a_time_in_seq: Wuxuu ciyaaraa notes chord mid mid isku xigxig. Kor = hoosta ilaa kor, Hoos = kor ilaa hoos. Wuxuu abuuraa patterns socda oo ka yimaada chords taagan.
somali.a_filter_removes_frequencies_above_low: Filter wuxuu ka saaraa frequencies ka sarreeya (lowpass), ka hooseeya (highpass), ama agagaarka (bandpass) cutoff frequency. Resonance (Q) wuxuu weyneeyaa frequencies u dhow cutoff, isagoo abuuraya buur.
somali.tremolo_periodic_volume_changes_amplit: Tremolo: isbeddellada volume ee xilliyeed (amplitude modulation). Vibrato: isbeddellada pitch ee xilliyeed (frequency modulation). Labadaba waxaa xakameeya LFO (Low Frequency Oscillator).
somali.discovered_in_1983_a_noise_burst_feeds: Waxaa la ogaaday 1983. Qarxin buuq ah ayaa gala delay line aad u gaaban oo leh feedback. Waqtiga delay ayaa go'aamiya pitch. Filter ku jira feedback loop wuxuu xakameeyaa iftiinka iyo dhicidda. Wuxuu si dabiici ah u qaadaa xadhkaha la jiiday.
somali.the_sequencer_is_a_composition_tool_ea: Sequencer waa qalab abuurista muusig. Tallaabo kasta waxay matashaa qaybinta beat. Safka melody wuxuu dejiyaa notes leh pitch, drums waxay ku daraan rhythm. Notation muusig wuxuu muujiyaa waxaad abuurto.
somali.notes_on_lines_and_spaces_represent_pi: Notes ku yaal xariiqyada iyo booska waxay matalaan pitches. Mudada waxaa lagu muujiyaa qaabka note: dhamaystiran (○), badh (𝅗𝅥), quarter (♩), siddeedaad (♪). Staff wuxuu isticmaalaa 5 xariiq.
somali.try_to_match_this_pattern: Isku day inaad la mid noqoto pattern-kan!
somali.equal_temperament_12_notes_per_octave_: Equal temperament: 12 notes octave kasta, saami 2^(1/12). A4 = 440 Hz; A5 = 880 Hz. Well-Tempered Clavier ee Bach (1722) wuxuu adduunka ku qanciyay heshiiskan. Note kasta oo aad halkan ku ciyaarto wuxuu ku nool yahay grid-kaas.
somali.major_w_w_h_w_w_w_h_minor_w_h_w_w_h_w_: Major: W-W-H-W-W-W-H. Minor: W-H-W-W-H-W-W. Modes 7 (Ionian, Dorian, Phrygian, Lydian, Mixolydian, Aeolian, Locrian) waxay ka yimaadaan wareejinta pattern interval ee major-scale.
somali.triads_root_third_fifth_major_4_3_semi: Triads: root + third + fifth. Major (semitones 4+3), minor (3+4), diminished (3+3), augmented (4+4). Chord 7th wuxuu ku daraa third kale. Muusig pop = chords ~6 oo la celceliyo; jazz wuxuu isticmaalaa extensions iyo substitutions.
somali.sustained_chord_textures_the_bed_under: Textures chord oo joogta ah — aasaaska ku hoos yaal ku dhawaad muusig filim kasta. Isku day iv-V-i minor, ama i-VI-VII dareenkaas Hans Zimmer. Drones fifths waxay taageeraan dhaqamada muusig dhaqameed ee India iyo bagpipe.
somali.beat_pad_sample_based_drums: Beat Pad — drums ku salaysan sample
somali.most_popular_music_sits_at_4_4_90_130_: Muusigga caanka ah badankiisu wuxuu ku yaal 4/4, 90-130 BPM. Hip-hop ~85-95, house 120-130, drum-and-bass ~170 (dareen half-time). Kick 1+3, snare 2+4 = backbeat — aasaaska rock + pop.
somali.pythagoras_500_bce_discovered_consonan: Pythagoras (~500 BCE) wuxuu ka helay consonance saamiyada frequency ee integer: octave 2:1, fifth 3:2, fourth 4:3. Helmholtz wuxuu balaariyay 1862. Cod = mowjadaha cadaadinta; muusig = patterns aan isku raacnay inaan quruxsan ku magacowno.
somali.full_chord_grid_strum_plate_and_voice_: Chord grid buuxa, strum plate, iyo voice presets
somali.drag_across_strings_to_strum: Jiid xadhkaha si aad u strum!
somali.frequency_modulation_fm_synthesis_uses: Frequency Modulation (FM) synthesis wuxuu isticmaalaa hal oscillator (modulator) si degdeg ah u beddela frequency-ga mid kale (carrier). Saamiga modulator:carrier wuxuu go'aamiya harmonic content. Saamiyada fudud (1:1, 2:1, 3:1) waxay soo saaraan harmonic tones. Saamiyada adag waxay soo saaraan codad bir ah, dawan u eg, ama aan harmonic ahayn. Yamaha DX7 ayaa caan ka dhigay FM 1983.
somali.supersaw_stacks_multiple_sawtooth_osci: SuperSaw wuxuu isku dul saaraa sawtooth oscillators badan oo si yar loo detune-gareeyay midba midka kale. Tani waxay abuurtaa cod weyn, ballaaran, oo dhalaalaya — astaanta EDM, trance, iyo pop casriga ah. Voices badan = cod dhuuban laakiin isticmaala CPU badan. Detuning wuxuu xakameeyaa inta voices u fog yihiin tuning — detune badan = ballaaran/chorus u eg, yar = adag/diiradda saaraya.
somali.an_arpeggiator_plays_the_notes_of_a_ch: 🔬 Arpeggiator wuxuu ciyaaraa notes chord mid mid isku xigxig. "Up" wuxuu ka socdaa hoosta ilaa kor, isagoo abuuraya tamar kor u kacaysa. "Down" wuxuu u soo degaa dareen biyo-dhac. Xawaaraha wuxuu xakameeyaa xawliga (yar = degdeg). Gate wuxuu xakameeyaa muddada note kasta uu dhawaaqo (100% = legato, 10% = staccato). Isku day xawaare=100ms + octaves 4 + up pattern classic trance arp!
somali.sing_speak_or_play_an_instrument_hear_: Hees, hadal, ama ciyaar aalad muusig — dhagayso effects wakhti dhab ah!
somali.how_effects_change_sound_waves: 🔬 Sida Effects u Beddelaan Mowjadaha Codka
somali.removes_frequencies_above_lowpass_or_b: Wuxuu ka saaraa frequencies ka sarreeya (lowpass) ama ka hooseeya (highpass) xad. Sida gacan afka lagu qariyo — wuxuu saaraa frequencies sare, codka wuxuu ka dhigaa "madow."
somali.creates_echoes_by_copying_the_signal_a: Wuxuu abuuraa dhawaaq-celin isagoo koobiyeeya signal-ka kuna ciyaaraya wakhti gaaban ka dib. Feedback wuxuu xakameeyaa inta dhawaaq-celin ay ku celceliyaan.
somali.simulates_room_acoustics_by_creating_t: Wuxuu qaadaa acoustics qolka isagoo abuuraya kumanaan dhawaaq-celin yaryar oo isku dhex jira. Qol yar = reverb gaaban, katedraal = reverb dheer.
somali.clips_the_waveform_peaks_turning_smoot: Wuxuu jaraa buuraha waveform, isagoo u beddela sine waves jilicsan qaabab adag, geesaley ah. Tani waxay ku dartaa harmonics cusub oo aan ku jirin codka asalka ah.
somali.duplicates_the_signal_with_a_slight_co: Wuxuu koobiyeeyaa signal-ka delay yar oo si joogto ah isu beddela. Tani waxay qaadaa voices/aalado badan oo wax yar wakhti kala duwan wada ciyaaraya.
somali.rapidly_varies_the_volume_up_and_down_: Wuxuu si degdeg ah u beddelaa volume kor iyo hoos, isagoo abuuraya saameyn garaacaya. Wuxuu ku badan yahay surf guitar iyo muusig organ.
somali.use_headphones_when_monitoring_to_avoi: Isticmaal headphones marka aad monitor-gareyneyso si aad uga fogaato feedback loops! Mic wuxuu maraa dhammaan effects-ka sare (filter, delay, reverb, iwm) — hagaaji si aad u maqasho sida mid kastaa u beddelo codkaaga ama aaladaada.
somali.connect_your_microphone_to_run_your_vo: Ku xir microphone-kaaga si aad u wado codkaaga ama aaladaada effects chain wakhti dhab ah.
somali.see_your_voice_as_a_waveform_frequency: Arag codkaaga oo ah waveform + frequency spectrum. Dhagayso sida filter, delay, reverb, distortion, iyo chorus ay jireed ugu beddelaan mowjadaha codka.
somali.touch_drag_x_pitch_y_filter_effect: Taabo & jiid — X = pitch, Y = filter/effect
somali.the_xy_pad_maps_your_finger_mouse_posi: XY pad wuxuu ku xiraa booska farta/mouse-kaaga parameters muusig wakhti dhab ah. Axis X wuxuu xakameeyaa pitch (bidix = hoos, midig = kor). Axis Y wuxuu xakameeyaa filter cutoff frequency (kor = iftiin, hoos = madow). Tani waxay la mid tahay aalado sida Korg Kaoss Pad, oo kacaan ku sameeyay ciyaarta muusig elektaroonig ah ee tooska ah iyagoo u beddelaya gestures 2D cod.
somali.xy_performance_pad_left_right_is_pitch: XY performance pad. Bidix-midig waa pitch, kor-hoos waa iftiinka filter. Isticmaal arrow keys si aad u dhaqaaqdo oo aad u ciyaarto note; taabo Escape ama Space si aad u joojiso.
somali.sequencer_drum_pads_notation_samples_m: Sequencer, drum pads, notation, samples & wax badan →
somali.tap_pads_to_place_beats: Taabo pads si aad u dhigto beats
somali.click_cells_to_place_notes_visual_melo: Guji cells si aad u dhigto notes — visual melody editor
somali.common_progressions_click_to_hear: Progressions caadi ah — guji si aad u maqasho
somali.chord_progressions_create_emotional_jo: Chord progressions waxay abuuraan safar shucuur ah. Chord I (tonic) wuxuu u dareemaa 'guri.' Chord V (dominant) wuxuu abuuraa culays raba in dib loogu xalliyo I. Chord vi (relative minor) wuxuu ku daraa murugo ama qoto. Chord IV (subdominant) si tartiib ah ayuu guriga uga fogaadaa. Waxaa la qiyaasaa in progression I-V-vi-IV ku muuqato in ka badan 70% heesaha pop sababtoo ah wuxuu si qumman u dheellitiraa shucuurahan.
somali.roman_numerals_i_ii_iii_iv_v_vi_vii_re: Tirooyinka Roomaanka (I, ii, iii, IV, V, vi, vii°) waxay matalaan heerarka scale. Xaraf weyn = chord major. Xaraf yar = chord minor.
somali.click_notes_to_hear_them: Guji notes si aad u maqasho!
somali.add_melody_notes_in_the_grid_above: Ku dar melody notes grid-ka sare ↑
somali.click_melody_cells_in_the_grid_above_t: Guji melody cells grid-ka sare si aad halkan u aragto notation
somali.click_challenge_me_to_practice_rhythm_: Guji "I loolan!" si aad ugu tababarto rhythm patterns
somali.upload_wav_mp3_files_for_custom_pads_s: Soo shubo faylalka WAV/MP3 custom pads. Samples way tirtiraan marka bogga la cusboonaysiiyo.
somali.add_current_pattern_as_a_section: Ku dar pattern hadda oo ah qayb
somali.add_current_as_section: + Ku dar Hadda oo ah Qayb
somali.create_a_drum_pattern_in_the_grid_abov: Abuur drum pattern grid-ka sare, ka dibna guji "+ Ku dar Hadda oo ah Qayb" si aad u bilowdo dhisidda heesta.
somali.sections_intro_verse_chorus_bridge_cho: Qaybaha: Intro → Verse → Chorus → Bridge → Chorus → Outro
somali.no_saved_beats_yet_create_a_pattern_an: Wali beats la kaydiyay ma jiraan. Abuur pattern kadibna guji Kaydi!
somali.harmonypad_creates_warm_pure_tones_by_: HarmonyPad wuxuu abuuraa tones diiran, saafi ah isagoo isku daraya sine iyo triangle waves. Dooro voice, ka dooro chord grid-ka hoose, ka dibna strum plate!
somali.chord_grid_tap_to_select_space_to_stru: 🎶 Chord Grid — taabo si aad u dooratid, Space si aad u strum
somali.strum_plate_tap_or_drag_across: 🎸 Strum Plate — taabo ama jiid dhinac
somali.hear_see_the_waveform_and_learn_the_st: Dhagayso, arag waveform, oo baro sheekada aalad kasta
somali.this_is_how_different_instruments_get_: Sidan ayay aalado kala duwan u helaan codkooda gaarka ah! Flute waa inta badan harmonic 1 (sine). Clarinet wuxuu leeyahay odd harmonics (1,3,5,7). Violin wuxuu leeyahay dhammaan harmonics. Guji si aad u dhisto timbre-kaaga!
somali.karplus_strong_synthesis_creates_reali: Karplus-Strong synthesis wuxuu abuuraa codad xadhig la jiiday oo dhab ah isagoo isticmaalaya qarxin buuq gaaban oo loo diray delay line leh filtered feedback. Hagaaji iftiinka (midabka buuqa hore) iyo damping (dhererka sustain) si aad u qaabayso dabeecadda xadhigga.
somali.strong_high_harmonics_pierces_sparkles: Harmonics sare oo xoog leh — mudda / dhalaalaya.
somali.fundamental_heavy_gentle_highs_acousti: Aasaas culus, highs jilicsan. Acoustic u eg.
somali.mid_heavy_without_fundamental_woody_cu: Dhexe culus oo aan aasaas lahayn — qori u eg/cuckoo flute.
somali.almost_pure_fundamental_muffled_sub_li: Ku dhawaad aasaas saafi ah — la xannibay / sub u eg.
somali.roughly_equal_harmonics_full_natural_t: Harmonics ku dhawaad siman — timbre buuxa / dabiici ah.
somali.adjust_fundamental_mid_and_high_harmon: Hagaaji heerarka harmonic ee fundamental, mid, iyo high. Widget wuxuu kala saaraa mid ka mid ah shan timbres oo kala duwan. Dhibco ma jiraan, muujin ma jirto — dhaqaaji oo eeg.
somali.hypothesis_free_text_which_harmonic_le: Mala-awaal (qoraal xor ah): Heerkee harmonic ayaa go'aamiya "iftiin" vs "diiran"?
somali.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Ma dhibban tahay — muuji prompts furan
somali.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Hay laba sliders adag. Dhaqaaji mid. Eeg.
somali.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_t: Hel laba dejin oo soo saara timbre isku mid ah. Saamiyadee bay wadaagaan?
somali.real_instruments_have_characteristic_s: Aalado dhabta ah waxay leeyihiin spectra gaar ah. Baadh sababta flute uga duwan yahay violin.
somali.explain_how_harmonic_content_determine: Sharax sida harmonic content u go'aamiyo aragtida timbre.
somali.design_note_discrete_5_class_timbre_ma: Qoraal naqshad: discrete 5-class timbre marker; dhibco daacadnimo cod ma jiraan; muujin ma jirto — ula kac.
somali.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: adigoo isticmaalaya erayo maalinle fudud iyo jumlado gaagaaban, jargon la'aan
somali.for_a_student_who_already_knows_some_m: arday horeba u yaqaan qaar ka mid ah music theory
somali.click_explain_for_the_ai_tutor_to_desc: Guji "Sharax" si uu AI tutor u sharaxo waxa muuqaalkani baro heerka akhriska aad dooratay.
somali.harmonic_series_why_instruments_sound_: 🎵 Harmonic Series — Sababta aalado u kala duwan yihiin dhawaaqa
